description: Internal route classifications for OpenAPI validation (#1247). Every operation in openapi/openapi.json whose path starts with one of these prefixes is infrastructure-only (health probes, inbound provider webhooks/callbacks, platform-admin infra, docs meta endpoints). Prefixes match document path keys, which do NOT include the /v1 global prefix (that lives in the spec's servers entry). Entries must keep matching at least one real operation — scripts/validate-openapi-spec.ts fails on stale prefixes.

internalRoutes.reason: Service-to-service internal endpoints (API-key guarded, not user-callable)
Docs meta endpoint (curated GPT Actions subset)
